name: PSI Monitor
legalNameNote: Marketing name for the PSI TradeMonitor NinjaTrader 8 add-on. In-product labels may differ.
description: PSI Monitor tracks seven behavioral dimensions and computes your Psychological Stability Index (PSI) during live and playback sessions — locally on your PC, with no cloud uploads.

systemRequirements.ninjaTrader: NinjaTrader 8 — we recommend the latest stable build from NinjaTrader
systemRequirements.note: Older NinjaTrader 8 builds may work but are not guaranteed. NinjaTrader 7 is not supported.
